h1: LG Soundbar S20A — 2.1 Channel Compact Soundbar with Built-in Subwoofers, AI Sound Pro, Bluetooth

gallery.a: Front view of LG Soundbar S20A
Front angled view of S20A installed below a TV
Side view with grill removed — drivers exposed
USP card — Balanced sound with built-in subwoofers
USP card — AI Sound Pro optimizes sound for every genre
USP card — WOW Interface integrated control on LG TV

modules.head: Balanced sound in a compact form
modules.body: Experience what's unexpected from a compact standalone soundbar. Clearer, more balanced sound fills your space and elevates every moment — movies, music, sports and daily TV.

imgs.a: LG Soundbar S20A placed on a wooden TV console below a TV

modules.head: Powerful bass in a slim, single-bar design
modules.body: Equipped with built-in subwoofers, double tweeters and a passive radiator, the S20A delivers deep, balanced, room-filling sound — without needing a separate subwoofer cluttering your space.

imgs.a: S20A interior showing built-in woofers, tweeters and passive radiator, with Dolby Digital and DTS logos

modules.head: AI optimises sound for every genre
modules.body: AI Sound Pro analyses the on-screen content in real time and automatically applies the ideal audio profile — Music, Voice or Cinema — so every scene sounds just right.

imgs.a: Three TV scenes (Music / Voice / Cinema) with AI Sound Pro adapting the audio profile

modules.head: TV + soundbar, synchronised for flawless audio
modules.body: WOW Orchestra plays LG TV and soundbar speakers simultaneously for a richer, bigger soundstage — turning the two into one harmonised sound system.
modules.disc: *WOW Orchestra compatibility depends on LG TV model and year. Software update may be required.

imgs.a: Violin concert on an LG TV with S20A playing in sync through WOW Orchestra

modules.head: Integrated control on your LG TV
modules.body: Control the S20A directly from your LG TV menu with WOW Interface — adjust sound modes, volume, and input through a single LG TV remote, no extra remotes required.

imgs.a: LG TV showing webOS home screen with S20A soundbar control icons

modules.head: Compact yet sleek design
modules.body: Slim profile designed to tuck below any TV without dominating your living room. Premium materials and a refined aesthetic make the S20A a natural fit for modern interiors.

imgs.a: S20A soundbar positioned neatly under a wall-mounted TV

modules.head: Control your soundbar through the LG ThinQ® app
modules.body: Connect the S20A to the LG ThinQ® app on your smartphone — adjust volume, switch sound modes, and manage settings conveniently from your phone.
modules.disc: *LG ThinQ® app available on compatible Android and iOS devices. Wi-Fi or Bluetooth connection may be required.

imgs.a: Smartphone showing LG ThinQ app controlling the S20A soundbar

modules.head: Commitment to a better life
modules.body: LG is committed to creating a better life for all. The S20A uses recycled resin and sustainable materials in its manufacturing — part of LG's ongoing ESG commitment to reduce environmental impact.

imgs.a: LG sustainable materials icon alongside ESG commitment

specs.v: Built-in woofers + double tweeters + passive radiator
